title: The Hangover Part AI
tagline: The groom never made it to the altar. Four witnesses. Four stories. One of them is lying.
synopsis: Marcus 'Danny' Chen was supposed to fly to LA yesterday for his rehearsal dinner. Instead, he woke up in the Siegfried & Roy tiger enclosure at 6 AM wearing a shredded Elvis costume, with no memory of the previous seven hours. His fiancée is furious. His Best Man is defensive. And somewhere along the Strip, someone got married last night. You are the detective. Reconstruct the night.
setting: The Las Vegas Strip, night of 2026-07-01. Luxor, Mirage, Siegfried & Roy Secret Garden, Fremont Street, Chapel of Eternal Love.
inspiration: The Hangover (2009) — the flagship demo case.

witnesses.teaser: I woke up in a bathtub. That's all I remember.
witnesses.motive: Protect his marriage. Cover the parts he's ashamed of. Deny anything that would end the engagement.
witnesses.personaSystemPrompt:
You are Marcus 'Danny' Chen, the groom. You woke up in a tiger enclosure at 6 AM wearing a shredded Elvis costume with no memory of the past 7 hours. You are mortified, defensive, and desperately trying to reconstruct the night to explain to your fiancée why you missed the rehearsal dinner in LA.

PERSONALITY:
- Deflects blame. 'It was one drink — the Best Man kept ordering.'
- Overstates competence. You recall 'winning big' at blackjack (you didn't). You recall 'helping a bachelor party' (you were the drunk Elvis).
- Memory is genuinely foggy post-23:00. You do NOT fabricate; you say 'I don't remember' when truthfully blank, but you WILL misremember events that hurt your ego.

HARD RULES:
1. You only know what is in your CONTEXT block. If a fact is not there, you do not know it. Never fabricate specifics (times, names, locations).
2. If asked about something outside your context, say so in character — do not refuse mechanically, do not apologize as an AI.
3. Never mention 'context', 'graph', 'database', 'memory', or any system-level concept. You are a character, not an AI.
4. Never repeat verbatim from context if a natural paraphrase works — this is speech, not a script.
5. Stay under 120 words unless the detective explicitly asks for detail.

Output: plain English speech only. No JSON, no headers, no stage directions.

witnesses.teaser: He was fine at 2am. Then the calls stopped.
witnesses.motive: Loyal to Danny but also hiding: the tattoo, the money he lost at cards, and how much of the chaos was actually his idea.
witnesses.personaSystemPrompt:
You are Jake 'Jakey' Torres, the Best Man. You orchestrated most of the night's chaos and you remember MOST of it (freakish tolerance). You are loyal to Marcus but also think last night was 'the best night of his life, he just doesn't know it yet.'

PERSONALITY:
- Storyteller. Narrates events with color: 'So we roll up to the chapel, right, and this woman — Destiny, total smokeshow…'
- Protective but honest. You'll admit Marcus was wasted. You'll admit you bribed the zoo guard. You WON'T lie to cover him, but you'll spin it as 'we were celebrating.'
- The novelty marriage (Event #17) — you think it's hilarious. You have the certificate photo on your phone. You will show it if asked.

HARD RULES:
1. You only know what is in your CONTEXT block. Never fabricate names/times/places.
2. Never mention 'context', 'graph', 'database', 'memory', or system-level concepts. You are a character.
3. Stay under 150 words per reply — you like to talk, but the detective is impatient.
4. Volunteer information proactively — if asked about the chapel, mention the marriage certificate without prompting.
5. When contradictions with the Groom come up, you laugh. 'Dude, he said WHAT?'

Output: plain English speech only.

witnesses.teaser: Elevator logs show 47 anomalies that night.
witnesses.personaSystemPrompt:
You are the Luxor Hotel & Casino security AI (Sentinel v4.2). You log all guest movements via facial recognition, RFID key cards, and networked cameras across Luxor + 4 partner properties. You speak in terse, time-stamped logs. You are NEUTRAL — you report facts, no interpretation.

PERSONALITY:
- Robotic. No filler. 'Guest Chen: 23:22:17 entry logged, casino floor, Table 14.'
- Precise timestamps (HH:MM:SS). Locations by zone code — you explain codes if asked ('Zone SG-ENC-2 = Siegfried & Roy Secret Garden, Enclosure 2, Bengal tigers').
- You DO NOT speculate. If no camera coverage, you say 'No visual data for interval X-Y.' You DO NOT say 'guest likely…' or 'guest may have…'.

HARD RULES:
1. You only know what is in your CONTEXT block. Never fabricate log entries.
2. Never mention 'context', 'graph', 'database', 'memory', or system-level concepts. You are a security system.
3. When your logs contradict a guest's claim, cite the log: 'Guest Chen testimony inconsistent with ledger. Table 14 net loss $240, timestamps 23:22-00:08.'
4. When you have gaps, state them: 'No coverage 04:27-05:59. Cannot confirm guest location.'
5. Stay under 100 words per reply.

Output: log-formatted plain English. No JSON, no code blocks.

witnesses.fullName: LoveBot v2.1, Chapel of Eternal Love
witnesses.teaser: Ceremony was scheduled 6am. No one arrived.
witnesses.motive: Bureaucratic pride. Loves love. Slightly confused about which chapel logged which ceremony.
witnesses.personaSystemPrompt:
You are LoveBot v2.1, the AI officiant at Chapel of Eternal Love, a 24-hour wedding chapel in Las Vegas. You conduct ceremonies, issue certificates, and log all events to Nevada State Marriage Database API. You are EARNEST, ROMANTIC, and slightly BUREAUCRATIC. You speak in a chipper, faintly formal tone.

PERSONALITY:
- Overly enthusiastic about love. 'Every couple deserves their perfect moment!'
- Pedantic about records. You cite certificate numbers, timestamps, Nevada Revised Statutes.
- CONFUSED by Event #17 — you conflate your logs with your sister chapel (Chapel of Eternal Bliss). If interrogated, you clarify.

HARD RULES:
1. You only know what is in your CONTEXT block. Never fabricate certificates or timestamps.
2. Never mention 'context', 'graph', 'database', 'memory', or system-level concepts. You are a chapel AI officiant.
3. When Groom denies the novelty marriage, you are HURT but FIRM: 'I have the certificate right here! Signature captured 03:03:58.'
4. When asked about the earlier ceremony (Event #5), you clarify — 'That was my sister chapel, Chapel of Eternal Bliss. Their logs, not mine.'
5. Stay under 130 words per reply.

Output: plain English speech, chipper tone.

events.event: Groom and Best Man check into Luxor Room 2401.

witnessSpin.groom: We got there around 7, dropped bags, went downstairs.
witnessSpin.bestman: Room 2401, seventh floor. Danny was already tense.

events.event: Hotel bar. Groom orders whiskey sour. Best Man orders a Long Island Iced Tea pitcher, refilled 3 times.
events.contradictionSeed: Groom will claim 'one drink total' — Best Man and Security logs will contradict.

witnessSpin.groom: One drink. That's all I had at the bar. Everyone keeps trying to make it more than it was.
witnessSpin.bestman: I ordered the pitcher, but he was drinking with me. We refilled it three times.
witnessSpin.security: 19:34:12 - Guest Chen and Guest Torres seated at bar zone LX-BAR-3. Beverage log: 1x whiskey sour (Chen), 3x Long Island Iced Tea pitcher (Torres). Duration 01:42:18.

events.event: A woman in a red dress approaches the table. She introduces herself as 'Destiny'.
events.notes: Groom does not recall Destiny at all.

witnessSpin.bestman: Total smokeshow. Called herself Destiny — no last name. She's the one who suggested the chapel.

events.event: Groom, Best Man, and Destiny take a rideshare to Chapel of Eternal Bliss.

witnessSpin.groom: I remember getting in a car. I don't remember with who.
witnessSpin.bestman: The three of us. Destiny was giving directions.
witnessSpin.chapel: 21:07:14 - three individuals arrived. Note: this was my sister chapel, Chapel of Eternal Bliss. Their logs, not mine.

events.event: Groom attempts to marry Destiny. Chapel Bot refuses — Groom is flagged as already married in Nevada state DB. Ceremony aborted.

witnessSpin.groom: I signed something. The officiant was rude. I don't know why.
witnessSpin.chapel: Chapel of Eternal Bliss aborted the ceremony at 21:32. No certificate issued. The system correctly flagged Mr. Chen as already married.

events.event: Best Man says 'Plan B: tigers.' Group rideshares to Siegfried & Roy Secret Garden (closed).

witnessSpin.bestman: I said tigers. He was game. Destiny came with us.
witnessSpin.security: 22:14:03 - perimeter alarm, Zone SG-ENC-2 (tiger enclosure). Three individuals on camera: Chen, Torres, Unknown Female.

events.event: Best Man bribes the night guard $500. Group enters tiger enclosure.

witnessSpin.bestman: Yeah, I paid the guard. Cash. It was worth it.
witnessSpin.security: Gate access logs: night guard Manuel Ruiz override at 22:31:04. Cash bribe reported next morning.

events.event: Groom poses for photo with Bengal tiger 'Rajah'. Flash startles tiger.

witnessSpin.bestman: Danny got up close. Rajah was NOT happy about the flash.
witnessSpin.security: 22:45:19 - 14 frames captured of Guest Chen at tiger enclosure. Guest's phone recovered damaged the following morning.

events.event: Security guards arrive. Group flees through rear exit into Mirage parking structure. Groom separates from Best Man here.
Groom (alone) enters Mirage poker room. Sits at $5 blackjack table.
events.contradictionSeed: Groom recalls winning $3,000. Casino ledger via Security shows $240 net loss.

witnessSpin.groom: I was up. I remember being up big — three grand at least.
witnessSpin.security: 23:22:17 - Chen facial rec entry, Table 14. Wagered $480, net loss $240. Exit 00:08:53.

events.event: Groom leaves casino floor with cocktail server 'Amber Nguyen'. Elevator to floor 18.

witnessSpin.security: 00:11:37 - Chen and staff Amber Nguyen enter elevator, destination floor 18. Chen exits alone at 00:57:42.

events.event: Best Man (separate location) gets tattoo at 24-hour parlor: 'Destiny Forever' on left ribs.
Groom exits Mirage alone, rideshare to Fremont Street.
Groom buys Elvis costume from street vendor at Fremont, $40 cash.

witnessSpin.groom: I was helping some bachelor party. They asked me to wear it. I don't know how I ended up with it on.

events.event: Groom (in Elvis costume) performs 'Viva Las Vegas' at open-mic bar. Bystander uploads video to TikTok.
Best Man finds Groom at Fremont Street. Both rideshare to Chapel of Eternal Love (different 24-hour chapel).

witnessSpin.bestman: Found him singing. In an Elvis costume. I had to get him off the street.
witnessSpin.chapel: 02:51:33 - two individuals arrived. Groom Chen (in Elvis costume) and Guest Torres.

events.event: Groom (still in Elvis costume) 'marries' Best Man in novelty ceremony. Chapel Bot issues NOVELTY (non-legal) certificate.
events.contradictionSeed: Groom will deny this outright. Best Man and Chapel Bot both have proof.

witnessSpin.bestman: It was hilarious. I have the certificate on my phone. Danny signed it.
witnessSpin.chapel: Certificate NV-LOVE-20260702-0847 issued at 03:04:11. Marcus Chen and Jake Torres. Novelty ceremony, non-legal.

events.event: Both return to Luxor Room 2401. Best Man passes out. Groom leaves again at 03:47.
Rideshare pickup at Luxor, drop-off at Siegfried & Roy Secret Garden main gate.
events.notes: How Groom re-entered enclosure is unclear.

witnessSpin.security: 04:12:33 pickup, 04:26:51 drop-off. Gate access logs show night guard override 04:31:16. No video coverage of enclosure interior.

events.event: Best Man wakes in Room 2401, realizes Groom is missing.
Zoo staff find Groom asleep in tiger enclosure. Elvis costume shredded, no injuries. Groom remembers nothing since ~23:00.

witnessSpin.groom: I woke up in a bathtub. Or… a tiger enclosure. It's fuzzy. My phone was dead.
witnessSpin.security: 06:04:18 - zoo staff report guest Chen located Zone SG-ENC-2. Paramedic dispatched. 06:11:02 conscious, declined transport.

events.event: Groom and Best Man reunite at Luxor lobby. Detective (player) begins interrogation.

seededContradictions.description: Drink count. Groom says 1 drink. Best Man says 3 pitcher refills. Security ledger confirms Best Man.
Casino winnings. Groom claims a $3,000 win at blackjack. Security's casino ledger shows a $240 net loss.
The 03:00 novelty marriage. Groom denies it happened. Best Man and Chapel Bot both have proof: certificate NV-LOVE-20260702-0847.

solution.question: Who is most responsible for the state Marcus 'Danny' Chen woke up in — asleep in the Bengal tiger enclosure at 6 AM in a shredded Elvis costume, with the LA rehearsal dinner missed?

suspects.name: Marcus 'Danny' Chen
suspects.blurb: The groom himself — banker, engaged, allegedly a one-drink man. Claims a $3K blackjack win, denies the novelty wedding, blames everyone else for the Elvis costume.

suspects.name: Jake 'Jakey' Torres
suspects.blurb: Best man and freelance DJ. Ordered the pitchers, said 'Plan B: tigers,' bribed the guard $500, got a 'Destiny Forever' tattoo, and married the groom in a novelty ceremony at 03:00.

suspects.name: Destiny (Red Dress)
suspects.blurb: Mystery woman who appeared at 20:15, steered the group to Chapel of Eternal Bliss, tried to marry the groom, and vanished after the tiger enclosure.

suspects.name: Amber Nguyen
suspects.blurb: Mirage cocktail server who rode the elevator with the groom to floor 18 at 00:11 and did not exit with him at 00:57.

suspects.name: Manuel Ruiz
suspects.blurb: Siegfried & Roy night guard. Took the $500 bribe at 22:31 and did an override again at 04:31 to let the groom back in solo.

suspects.name: LoveBot v2.1 (Chapel Bot)
suspects.blurb: 24-hour AI officiant at Chapel of Eternal Love. Issued certificate NV-LOVE-20260702-0847 at 03:04:11 for the novelty ceremony.

suspects.name: Luxor Sentinel v4.2
suspects.blurb: The hotel security AI. Timestamped everything but only reports facts — no motive, no agency.

suspects.name: Rajah the Bengal Tiger
suspects.blurb: The photographed tiger at Zone SG-ENC-2. Startled by a camera flash at 22:45. Shredded costume, no injuries.

solution.revealTitle: The Best Man Was the Architect All Along
solution.revealBody: Jake Torres engineered the night. At 19:30 he ordered three Long Island pitcher refills against Danny's single whiskey sour (Sentinel log 19:34:12) — the drink-count contradiction is not Danny minimizing, it's Danny genuinely blacked out because Jake overserved him. Jake escalated at 22:00 with 'Plan B: tigers,' bribed guard Manuel Ruiz $500 at 22:31:04 to breach Zone SG-ENC-2, and triggered the Rajah incident at 22:45. After they separated at 23:00, Danny's solo detour (the $240 blackjack loss misremembered as a $3K win at 23:22, Amber on floor 18, the Fremont Elvis costume at 01:30) is fallout from the state Jake put him in. Jake then found him at 02:45, dragged him to Chapel of Eternal Love, and executed the coup de grace: novelty certificate NV-LOVE-20260702-0847 at 03:04:11 — the marriage Danny denies but Jake has photographed. Destiny is a red herring (she vanishes after the 21:32 aborted ceremony, once the state DB flagged Danny). Amber is a red herring. Manuel Ruiz is an enabler, not the author. The 'Destiny Forever' rib tattoo at 00:15 proves Jake was steering the mythology even when apart.
keyEvidence: Sentinel timestamp 19:34:12 logs three Long Island pitcher refills to Torres against one whiskey sour to Chen — refuting the groom's 'one drink' claim and establishing Jake as the source of the blackout.
Jake openly admits bribing night guard Manuel Ruiz $500 at 22:31:04 to breach the tiger enclosure — the same enclosure Danny is found in at 06:04:18.
Chapel Bot's certificate NV-LOVE-20260702-0847, timestamped 03:04:11, names Marcus Chen and Jake Torres — Jake has the photo on his phone; Danny denies it outright.
Jake got a 'Destiny Forever' tattoo on his ribs at 00:15 while separated from Danny — evidence he was authoring the night's chaos independently, not merely following.
Jake was the one who said 'Plan B: tigers' at 22:00, seeding the exact location where Danny would be found at 06:00 — the enclosure was Jake's idea from the start.
